name: White Fish Pieces in Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fish fillet (e.g., sole, snapper, butterfish)
1 cup Bean thread noodles (or vermicelli), soaked
recipeInstructions:
Refreshing to the palate, very tasty and filling.
Preparation: Peel cucumber; slice thinly crosswise. Wash Chinese parsley; remove stems.
Cook Soup: Combine stock and ginger root in a saucepan; bring to just under boil. Remove ginger slice. Add noodles, sugar, and cornstarch paste; stir. Add fish and cucumber. Cook at high simmer until fish is done (3-5 minutes). Do not allow broth to boil; you want it to remain clear. Serve garnished with parsley leaves in a covered serving bowl.
